name: The Clearing — merge Bridge + Clearing into one service

steps.title: Add chat panel — absorb Clearing chat into Bridge UI
steps.gate: Chat panel opens on same page as dashboard. Anthropic API wired. DECISION: capture works. Transcript indexed.

steps.title: Retire Go binary + port 3460
steps.gate: Go binary deleted. LaunchAgent unloaded. Port 3460 not listening. Tunnel route removed. Zero codebase references.

steps.title: Rename LaunchAgent com.chorus.bridge → com.chorus.clearing
steps.gate: Plist renamed. Label updated. Loads on reboot. Zero references to com.chorus.bridge.

success_criteria: Jeff opens one URL (localhost:3470 or clearing.lightlifeurbangardens.com) and sees dashboard + chat on the same screen. Port 3460 doesn't exist. The name is The Clearing everywhere.
